case_title: MICHAEL GADOUA VS. RICARDO ROBERT MONTERROSA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,318.50 FILED BY GADOUA, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT MONTERROSA, RICARDO ROBERT AKA LAW OFFICES OF R. ROBERT MONTEROSSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GADOUA, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT MONTERROSA, RICARDO ROBERT AKA LAW OFFICES OF R. ROBERT MONTEROSSA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-09-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MONTERROSA, RICARDO ROBERT AKA LAW OFFICES OF R. ROBERT MONTEROSSA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GADOUA, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTERROSA, RICARDO ROBERT AKA LAW OFFICES OF R. ROBERT MONTEROSSA $1,280.00 PRINCIPAL, $44.05 INTEREST, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,364.05, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REC'D LETTER FROM PLTF STATING THAT DEFT HAD PAID $1000 RIGHT BEFORE HEARING AND THEREFORE THE JUDGMENT IS INCORRECT, CALLED PLTF AND NOTIFIED HIM TO CONTACT LEGAL ADVISOR OR COMPLETE FORMS TO DOCUMENT THE CREDIT. LETTER PLACED IN FILE
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER REC'D AND FILED, COPY SENT TO DEFT.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT
ORDER *AMENDED* ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT
